allow: Bash(php -r "if \(function_exists\(''opcache_reset''\)\) { opcache_reset\(\); echo ''OPcache cleared''; } else { echo ''OPcache not available''; }")
Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="use App\\Models\\ProductVariant; $v = ProductVariant::find\(377\); var_dump\($v->images, $v->image_urls\);")
Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo App\\Models\\Product::find\(375\) ? ''Product exists'' : ''Product NOT found'';")
Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo \\Illuminate\\Support\\Facades\\Schema::hasTable\(''jobs''\) ? ''jobs table exists'' : ''jobs table MISSING'';")
